claim: This source kit is not an identity provider, authentication backend, authorization boundary, credential store, security audit, Stable release, or distribution-parity claim.

semantics.nativeBasis: Native forms and autocomplete tokens composed with canonical Mergora fields, password, OTP, and button controls.
semantics.rolePolicy: Submission failures are alerts, successful results are statuses, and rate-limit countdown output is opt-in.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through enabled flow choices, native fields, reveal actions, and form actions in document order.
Submits the current valid native form without intercepting IME composition.
Restores uncontrolled native values and clears component-owned result state when mutable; read-only mode disables and cancels reset without mutation.

nonColor: Current flow, success, error, rate-limit, disabled, and pending states use text and native state in addition to green or violet signals.
responsive: Navigation becomes a labelled horizontal strip on narrow screens; fields remain a single readable column with logical RTL geometry.
consumerResponsibilities: Keep credentials and provider secrets off the client and use secured, origin-bound server endpoints.
Authorize every flow, configure rate limits, session policy, passkey policy, recovery, logging, privacy, and incident response.
Localize every visible and spoken string and complete security, threat-model, browser, device, password-manager, and assistive-technology review.
